Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Zenith Colony]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Zenith Colony appears as a huge, obsidian cube filled with purple light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The space inside the Zenith Colony is a fractured kaleidoscope of purple like broken amethyst shards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Ships spill out of the Zenith Colony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — The Zenith Colony can fold back into a stone the size of a human head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — The Zenith Colony is floating next to Starhammer's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — The Zenith Colony has specific capabilities that are difficult to understand precisely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — The Zenith Colony is a location that aided Starhammer's investigation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — The Zenith Colony is a location where combat can continue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — The Zenith Colony did not respond to Starhammer's call for Shadow Ark.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — The narrator cannot read the Zenith Colony's expression while he is in his jeweled form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — The Zenith Colony claims to be picky about the planets it adds to its internal system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Zenith Colony is a hidden city in the stars.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — The Zenith Colony is also known as Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Shadow Ark is a Zenith Colony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Raion was looking at the Zenith Colony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Zenith Colony spoke to Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Horizon sensed the Zenith Colony.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — The Zenith Colony is part of the group Shyrax must coordinate with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The Zenith Colony's voice comes from the violet-edged sky.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
